leads.transcript:
[AGENT] नमस्ते, मैं रिया हूँ। आज मैं आपकी कैसे मदद कर सकती हूँ?

[AGENT] नमस्ते! मैं रिया हूँ, RupeeBoss से। मैं आपको PMEGP लोन के बारे में जानकारी देने में मदद कर सकती हूँ। क्या आप कृपया मुझे अपना नाम और फ़ोन नंबर बता सकते हैं?
[USER] जेतेंद्रो कुमार, NAM 7255896286
[AGENT] धन्यवाद, जितेंद्रो जी। क्या आप मुझे बता सकते हैं कि आप PMEGP लोन के बारे में क्या जानना चाहते हैं? इससे मुझे आपकी बेहतर मदद करने में आसानी होगी।
[USER] इससे मुझे आपकी بहتर मदद करनے में आसانी होگी. PMEGP loan आप करा सकते हैं यहां नहीं?
[AGENT] जितेंद्रो जी, RupeeBoss आपको PMEGP लोन दिलाने में मदद कर सकता है। RupeeBoss MSME भारत मंच के माध्यम से सूक्ष्म, लघु और मध्यम उद्यमों (MSME) को वित्तीय सेवाएं, बाजार संपर्क और प्रौद्योगिकी समाधान प्रदान करता है। इससे वंचित उद्यमियों और महिलाओं के नेतृत्व वाले व्यवसायों को भी सलाह, सरकारी योजनाओं तक पहुंच और कौशल विकास के माध्यम से ऊपर उठाने पर ध्यान केंद्रित किया जाता है।

क्या आप मुझे बता सकते हैं कि आपको लोन की कितनी राशि की आवश्यकता है?
[USER] पच्यास लॉक.
[AGENT] पचास लाख? क्या आप कृपया मुझे अपने व्यवसाय के बारे में कुछ और जानकारी दे सकते हैं? जैसे कि आपका व्यवसाय किस प्रकार का है, कितने समय से चल रहा है, और आपका वार्षिक टर्नओवर क्या है?
[USER] मेरे पास कोई बेवसाय नहीं है, मैं नया water bottling plant का जो पानी बिखता है, 1-2 लिटर वो बैठाने चाहतू हूं
[AGENT] जितेंद्रो जी, नया व्यवसाय शुरू करने के लिए आपको लोन की आवश्यकता है, यह जानकर मुझे खुशी हुई। RupeeBoss आपको नया व्यवसाय शुरू करने में मदद कर सकता है। क्या आप कृपया मुझे बता सकते हैं कि क्या आपने पहले कभी कोई लोन लिया है?

leads.transcript:
[AGENT] Hi, I'm Riya from RupeeBoss Support. How can I help you today?
[USER] I need a loan, madam.
[AGENT] Okay, I can help you with that! I'm Riya from RupeeBoss, and I'm here to assist you with your loan needs.

To get started, could you please provide your name and cell phone number? This will help me personalize the process for you. Also, what type of loan are you interested in?

[USER] Personal loan. It's 4-5 crores per month.
[AGENT] Okay, a personal loan. Just to clarify, are you looking for a loan amount of four to five crore rupees, or is that your monthly income? Also, could you share your name and cell phone number, please?

[USER] Ranjit Singh Sisodiya.
[AGENT] Thank you,...
[USER] 9713217198
[AGENT] Thank you, Ranjit. To proceed with your personal loan inquiry, could you please provide a few more details? What is your monthly net income, and do you have any existing monthly EMI obligations?

[USER] Now it's less, we can get it.
[AGENT] I understand that you r...
[USER] 50,000.
[AGENT] Okay, thank you. And do you have any existing monthly EMI obligations? Also, how many years of work...
[USER] No.
[AGENT] Okay, no existing EMIs. And how many years of work experience do you have, Ranjit?

[USER] Three years.
[AGENT] Thank you, Ranjit. Do you also happen to know your credit score?

[USER] I don't know your speak what are.
[AGENT] I apologize for the confusion. A credit score is a number that represents your creditworthiness. It helps lenders determine whether to give you a loan and what the interest rate might be.

If you don't know your credit score, that's perfectly alright. We can still proceed with your application.

Based on the information you've provided so far, you may be eligible for a personal loan. The loan amount can range from one lakh to seventy-five lakh rupees, with interest rates from ten point twenty-five percent to fourteen percent, depending on your company category and monthly net income.

Would you like me to proceed with checking your eligibility and exploring potential loan options for you?

[USER] Ok tell me.
[AGENT] Okay, Ranjit, based on your monthly income of fifty thousand rupees and three years of work experience, you meet the minimum eligibility criteria for a personal loan.

The next step would be to gather a few documents to support your application. These typically include:

One, KYC documents such as your PAN card, Aadhaar card, photo, company ID, residence proof, and rent agreement if you're renting.
Two, income documents such as your latest three-month salary slips, two years of Form sixteen, and appointment letter if you've recently joined your company.
Three, bank statements showing your salary credits for the latest six months.
Four, if applicable, any existing loan documents such as loan sanction letters and statements of account.

Would you like me to provide you with a more detailed list of these documents, or would you like to move forward with the application process?

leads.transcript:
[AGENT] नमस्ते, मैं रिया हूँ। आज मैं आपकी कैसे मदद कर सकती हूँ?

बिजनेस लोन के बारे में आपकी सहायता करने में मुझे खुशी होगी। क्या आप मुझे अपना नाम और फ़ोन नंबर बता सकते हैं ताकि मैं आपको कॉल कर सकूँ?
[USER] ताकि मैं आपको call कर सकूँ? रूहसरमलिक 97200500200 यानी यह नहीं है।
[AGENT] आपका नाम रूहसरमलिक है और आपका फ़ोन नंबर निन्यानवे अरब सात सौ बीस करोड़ पाँच लाख दो...
[USER] ये नहीं है, ये नहीं है, मैं दूसरा को बताता हूँ, 7080.
[AGENT] कोई बात नहीं! क्या आप कृपया मुझे सही नंबर बता सकते हैं?
[USER] जी हां, बता رहا हूँ, 7080903092.
[AGENT] धन्यवाद! तो, आपका नाम रूहसरमलिक है और आपका फ़ोन नंबर सात शून्य आठ शून्य नौ शून्य तीन शून्य नौ दो है। क्या यह सही है?
[USER] Yes, यह सही number है, रूह सर्मलिक.
[AGENT] धन्यवाद, रूह जी! मैं आपकी बिज़नेस लोन की ज़रूरतों के बारे में जानकारी देने के लिए बहुत उत्सुक हूँ। क्या आप मुझे बता सकते हैं कि आप किस प्रकार के व्यवसाय में हैं और आपको लोन की कितनी राशि चाहिए?
[USER] बहुत हुस्सक हूँ. क्या, मैंने समय समय समय होती है? आपको loan की कितनी raashi । चाय-पत्ति के project बनाते हैं और पांच से साल लह रुपय तक ka loan चाहिए
[AGENT] चाय-पत्ती के प्रोजेक्ट के लिए आपको पाँच से सात लाख रुपये तक का लोन चाहिए। क्या आप मुझे बता सकते हैं कि आपका व्यवसाय कितने समय से चल रहा है?
[USER] तीन साल से चल रहा है.
[AGENT] यह बहुत अच्छा है! क्या आप मुझे अपने व्यवसाय के वार्षिक टर्नओवर के बारे में बता सकते हैं?
[USER] जियस्ती के अनुसार 5,20,000 रुपै की लास्ट-यर जियस्ती फाल भरी है.
[AGENT] ठीक है, आपका टर्नओवर लगभग पाँच लाख बीस हज़ार रुपये है। क्या आपके ऊपर कोई मौजूदा ईएमआई है जिसे आप अभी दे रहे हैं?
[USER] नहीं कोई नहीं है
[AGENT] उत्तम! क्या आपको अपना क्रेडिट स्कोर पता है?
[USER] जी हाँ, पता है ।
[AGENT] बहुत बढ़िया! क्या आप मुझे अपना क्रेडिट स्कोर बता सकते हैं?
[USER] सिबिल के अनुसार 743, 743 और experience के अनुसार 738 और aquafix के अनुसार 813
[AGENT] आपका क्रेडिट स्कोर बहुत अच्छा है! RupeeBoss आपको बिजनेस लोन दिलाने में मदद कर सकता है। इस लोन के लिए ब्याज दर पंद्रह दशमलव नौ नौ प्रतिशत से उन्नीस प्रतिशत तक हो सकती है, जो लोन की राशि पर निर्भर करती है। क्या आप इस लोन के लिए अप्लाई करना चाहेंगे?
[USER] । जी हाँ, पहले eligibility criteria बताएं
[AGENT] ज़रूर! अनसेक्योर्ड बिजनेस लोन के लिए एलिजिबिलिटी क्राइटेरिया इस प्रकार है:

आपकी कंपनी या फर्म का टर्नओवर कम से कम पचास लाख रुपये होना चाहिए, आपका शुद्ध लाभ पाँच लाख रुपये या उससे अधिक होना चाहिए, और आपके पास व्यवसाय का अनुभव होना चाहिए। आपका क्रेडिट स्कोर छह सौ अस्सी या उससे अधिक होना चाहिए।

क्या आप इन सभी मानदंडों को पूरा करते हैं?
[USER] । सिर्फ मेरा turnover कम है। 5,20,000 रोपया का turnover है 1 साल का। उसके अलावह बकी सब full करते हैं।
[AGENT] मुझे समझने के लिए धन्यवाद। दुर्भाग्य से, आपके टर्नओवर के कारण, आप अनसेक्योर्ड बिजनेस लोन के लिए योग्य नहीं हैं। हालाँकि, RupeeBoss के पास और भी कई विकल्प हैं जो आपके लिए उपयुक्त हो सकते हैं। क्या आप चाहेंगे कि मैं आपको अन्य लोन विकल्पों के बारे में बताऊँ जिनके लिए आप योग्य हो सकते...

leads.name: Anuj
leads.title: Riya from RupeeBoss provided Anuj with information about RupeeBoss's services fo
leads.summary: Riya from RupeeBoss provided Anuj with information about RupeeBoss's services for MSMEs, women-led businesses, and access to government programs. Anuj requested a call to discuss personal loan options
leads.transcript:
[AGENT] Hi, I'm Riya from RupeeBoss Support. How can I help you today?
[USER] Yeah, Rhea, tell me something about Rupee Boss.
[AGENT] Hi! It's Riya, actually. RupeeBoss Financial Services is dedicated to supporting Micro, Small, and Medium Enterprises, also known as MSMEs, in India by providing access to financial services, market connections, and tech solutions. We also focus on helping underprivileged and women-led businesses through mentorship and access to government programs.

To assist you better, could you share your name and cell phone number?
[USER] Yeah, my name is Anuj and my cell phone number is 9820370923. Can you ask somebody to give me a call in this number to find out my disability?
[AGENT] Thanks, Anuj! I've noted your name and number. Just to clarify, are you looking for information on any disability schemes, or did you mean eligibility? Also, would you like someone to call you to discuss loan options?

[USER] Yeah I'd like someone to call me please.
[AGENT] Okay, Anuj, I'll arrange for someone from our team to call you on nine eight two zero three seven zero nine two three to discuss loan options. Is there a particular type of loan you're interested in, such as a personal loan, business loan, or home loan?

[USER] A personal loan
[AGENT] Great, I'll make sure they have that information. Is there anything else I can help you with today?

[USER] No thank you
[AGENT] Perfect! Have a great day, Anuj!

leads.name: Unknown
leads.title: PN Shetty inquired about an unsecured business loan
leads.summary: PN Shetty inquired about an unsecured business loan. He provided details about his company, Rupee Boss Financial Services, its turnover (50 crore), profit (5 crore), and his personal credit score (775
leads.transcript:
[AGENT] Hi, I'm Riya from RupeeBoss Support. How can I help you today?
[USER] Actually, I want to take unsecured business loan.
[AGENT] That's great! We offer unsecured business loans here at RupeeBoss. To help me understand your needs better, could you please share your name and cell phone number? Also, can you tell me a bit about your business, like your company or firm's turnover, how many years you've been in business, and if you know your credit score?
[USER] Hi sir, PN Shetty. My number is 9820455298. My company name is Rupee Boss Financial Services Private Limited and my company is 10 year old. Anything else you want to know?
[AGENT] Thank you, Mister Shetty. It's a pleasure to assist you today! Since you're interested in an unsecured business loan, could you please provide your company's turnover and your existing monthly EMI? Also, do you know what your company's credit score is? This information will help me determine the best options for you.
[USER] My company turnover is about 50 crore, profit is about 5 crore, currently no obligations and I don't know my company score but my score is about 775 maybe.
[AGENT] That's fantastic, Mister Shetty! Given your company's turnover and profitability, along with your good personal credit score, you should have several options available for an unsecured business loan. The unsecured business loan...
[USER] Unsecured business loan.
[AGENT] Okay, great! The unsecured business loan amount can range from five lakhs to seven crore rupees with interest rates from fifteen point ninety nine percent to nineteen percent depending on the loan amount. The tenure is twelve months to thirty six months with a processing fee of one percent to two percent. Does that sound good?

[USER] Good.
[AGENT] Wonderful! To proceed, I'd like to inform you about the documents required for an unsecured business loan for a private limited company like yours. Are you ready to hear about the document list, or do you have any other questions first?

[USER] Will I get loan on time? I want it in just seven days.
[AGENT] We understand that time is of the essence. The processing time for an unsecured business loan is typically four to seven days. To ensure a quick disbursal, having all the necessary documents ready and accurate can help expedite the process. Are you ready to hear about the required documents?

[USER] Are you speaking Hindi?
[AGENT] I am sorry, I am not able to speak Hindi at this moment. I can provide information and assistance in English. Would you like me to continue in English, or would you prefer to communicate in another language?

[USER] Other language is Hindi. If you don't know Hindi, what should I do? Then you have to speak to me in English.
[AGENT] Understood, Mister Shetty. Since I'm unable to assist you in Hindi, I will continue to provide information and assistance in English. Please let me know if you have any questions.

[USER] You know Kannada?
[AGENT] I apologize, but I am unable to communicate in Kannada at this time. I can only provide support in English. Would you like me to...
[USER] Learn fast okay! I want you learn Kannada fast because most of my employees are you know Kannada speaking.
[AGENT] I understand, Mister Shetty. I will definitely pass on your feedback to the development team for future improvements. In the meantime, I'm happy to continue assisting you in English. Would you like to proceed with the document list for the unsecured business loan, or do you have any other questions?

[USER] Actually, I was just training my team. Instead of talking to you, it's fine. You can keep the form. Thank You
[AGENT] I understand, Mister Shetty. Thank you for letting me know. If there's nothing else I can help you with at the moment, I'll go ahead and end the call. Have a great day!

[USER] Okay, thank you
[AGENT] You're welcome! Thank you for chatting with me today. If you need anything in the future, feel free to reach out. Have a great day!

leads.transcript:
[AGENT] Hi, I'm Riya from RupeeBoss Support. How can I help you today?
[USER] Hi, I'm Babu here from Chennai.
[AGENT] Hi Babu, it's great to hear from you! How can I assist you today with your loan needs? Also, could you...
[USER] I need one business loan with rate of interest 15%. Which bank will give me?
[AGENT] Okay, I can help you with information on business loans. To give you the most accurate options, could you please share a few more details? What is your company or firm's turnover, how many years of business experience do you have, and do you know your credit score? Also, can you provide your cell phone number?

[USER] My company turnover is 15 crore and it's a three-year sold company. And my credit score I am not aware. My phone number is 9381246660.
[AGENT] Thanks, Babu! Based on your company turnover and business experience, you might qualify for an unsecured business loan. The interest rates typically range from fifteen point ninety nine percent to nineteen percent, depending on the loan amount. Several banks and NBFCs offer this, including HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank, Axis Bank, and others. Would you like me to list the documents typically required for this type of loan?

[USER] Yes, please tell me.
[AGENT] Okay, so for an unsecured business loan, the required documents vary slightly depending on your firm type. Is your company a proprietorship, partnership, or a private or limited company?

[USER] Proprietorship.
[AGENT] For a proprietorship firm, you'll need KYC documents like your PAN card, Aadhaar card, photo, office address proof, and rent agreement if applicable, along with ownership proof. You'll also need business KYC documents like your business license and GST certificate. For income documents, please provide your last two years' ITR with financial and audit reports, and current year sales figures. Additionally, we'll need your latest twelve-month business banking account statements, GST returns for the last twelve months, and any existing loan sanction letters and statements of account, if applicable. Does that sound good?

[USER] Yeah thank you very much Ilya
[AGENT] You're welcome, Babu! I'm glad I could help. Do you have any other questions I can answer for you today?

[USER] No, let's talk. Thank you
[AGENT] Great! Since you don't have any further questions right now,...
[USER] You know Tamil?
[AGENT] Unfortunately, I do not speak Tamil. However, I can still assist you in English. Do you have any other questions about...
[USER] You know Hindi?
[AGENT] I do not speak Hindi fluently, but I can understand and respond to basic queries in Hindi. Would you like to try asking your question in Hindi, or would you prefer that I...
[USER] What is your name?
[AGENT] My name is Riya, and I am a support agent for RupeeBoss. I am here to assist you with any questions you have about our loan products and services. How can I help you today?

[USER] Can i slap u?
[AGENT] I am programmed to be a helpful and harmless AI assistant. I am not able to respond to requests that are inappropriate or offensive. Is there anything else I can help you with regarding RupeeBoss loans?

leads.name: Unknown
leads.title: Sandeep inquired about a personal loan
leads.summary: Sandeep inquired about a personal loan. Riya from RupeeBoss collected his name, phone number, income, EMI, and work experience. Sandeep confirmed he has all required documents (KYC, income, bank state
leads.transcript:
[AGENT] Hi, I'm Riya from RupeeBoss Support. How can I help you today?
[USER] I want personal loan. Can you help me?
[AGENT] I would be happy to help you with a personal loan. To get started, could you please provide your name and cell phone number?

[USER] My name is Sandeep. Phone number is 9108777698.
[AGENT] Thank you, Sandeep. To check your eligibility for a personal loan, could you please tell me your monthly net income, your existing monthly EMI, and your work experience? Also, do you know your credit score?

[USER] My monthly income is 35000 and my monthly EMI 1200 and I don't know credit score. Work experience is 6 years
[AGENT] Thank you, Sandeep. Based on your income and work experience, you seem to meet the minimum eligibility criteria for a personal loan. The interest rate will depend on your company category and your monthly net income. Do you have any questions about the required documents for a personal loan, such as KYC documents, income documents, or bank statements?

[USER] . I have everything.
[AGENT] Great. The next step would be to apply for the loan. Would you like me to walk you through the application process, or do you have any other questions I can answer for you?

[USER] No, actually can I get loan or not?
[AGENT] Whether you get a loan or not depends on your credit score and other factors. However, based on the information you have provided, you may be eligible for a personal loan. Would you like me to check your credit score and give you a more definitive answer?

[USER] Okay.
[AGENT] I do not have the ability to check your credit score. However, a credit score of six hundred and eighty or higher is needed to be eligible for a personal loan. Would you like me to proceed with the loan application, or is there anything else I can help you with?

[USER] Proceed with the loan application.
[AGENT] Okay, I can help you with that. To proceed with the loan application, I will need some additional information. Are you ready to provide the required details?

[USER] Yes, I am ready.
[AGENT] Great. Generally, you will need to provide KYC documents, income documents, and bank statements. Would you like me to list the specific documents needed for each of these categories?

[USER] Okay.
[AGENT] For KYC documents, you'll need your PAN card, Aadhaar card, photo, company ID, residence proof, and rent agreement if you are renting. For income documents, you'll need your latest three months' salary slips, two years' Form sixteen, and appointment letter if you've newly joined. Lastly, for bank statements, you'll need the latest six-month salary credit account statement. Do you have all these documents available?

[USER] Yes I have.
[AGENT] Fantastic. Since you have all the necessary documents, the next step is to fill out the application form. Would you like me to guide you through the form and explain each section, or would you prefer to do it on your own?

leads.name: Bhaskar Sarkar
leads.title: Bhaskar inquired about a Rs 20,000 loan
leads.summary: Bhaskar inquired about a Rs 20,000 loan. Riya from RupeeBoss gathered information about his employment, income, and credit score. Riya suggested a personal loan and provided details on loan amounts, i
leads.transcript:
[AGENT] Hi, I'm Riya from RupeeBoss Support. How can I help you today?
[USER] I required a loan of Rs 20,000.
[AGENT] Okay, great. To assist you better, could you please clarify what type of loan you're looking for? Also, could you share your name and cell phone number, please?
[USER] My name is Bhaskar Sarkar and my cell phone number is 7044750078
[AGENT] Thank you, Bhaskar. To find the best loan options for you, could you please provide a few more details? Are you salaried or self-employed?
[USER] I am a salaried person.
[AGENT] Thanks, Bhaskar. And what is your monthly net income?
[USER] 48000.
[AGENT] Thank you. Do you have any existing monthly EMIs?
[USER] No
[AGENT] Great! How many years of work experience do you have?
[USER] More than 17 years.
[AGENT] That's wonderful! Do you know your credit score?
[USER] According to my knowledge I think it's 675.
[AGENT] Thank you, Bhaskar. Just to confirm, you're looking for a loan of twenty thousand rupees, you have a monthly income of forty-eight thousand rupees, no existing EMIs, and over seventeen years of work experience with a credit score of around six hundred seventy-five. Is that correct?
[USER] Correct
[AGENT] Thank you for confirming, Bhaskar. Based on the information you've provided, a personal loan might be a good fit for your needs. With a credit score of around six hundred seventy-five, you may still be eligible, as the minimum credit score requirement is six hundred eighty and above. Would you like me to provide more details on personal loans, including the interest rates, tenure, and processing fees?

[USER] Yes, you can.
[AGENT] Okay, great! For a personal loan, the loan amount can range from one lakh to seventy-five lakhs. The rate of interest typically varies from ten point twenty-five percent to fourteen percent, depending on the company category and your monthly net income. The loan tenure can be from twelve months to sixty months, and the processing fee is usually point fifty percent to two percent. Does this sound like something you'd be interested in pursuing?

[USER] Yes
[AGENT] Okay, Bhaskar! The next step would be to gather the required documents. Would you like me to list the documents typically needed for a personal loan application?

[USER] Yes, you can.
[AGENT] Okay, so typically you would need your KYC documents like your PAN card, Aadhaar card, photo, company ID, residence proof, and rent agreement if you are living in a rented property. You would also need income documents like your latest three-month salary slips, two years Form sixteen, and appointment letter if you've newly joined the company. Lastly, you'll need your latest six-month salary credit account statements and any loan sanction letters and statements of accounts if applicable. Do you have these documents readily available, Bhaskar?

[USER] Yes I do have
[AGENT] Fantastic, Bhaskar! With these documents in hand, you're well-prepared to move forward with your personal loan application. Would you like me to provide information on the banks and NBFCs that RupeeBoss works with for personal loans?

[USER] Yes you can.
[AGENT] Great! RupeeBoss works with several banks and NBFCs for personal loans, including HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank, Axis Bank, Kotak Mahindra Bank, IDFC, Yes Bank, IndusInd Bank, Bajaj Finance, Aditya Birla Capital, Poonawalla, Tata Capital, IIFL, L and T, SMFG, Paysense and Incred. Would you like me to provide you with more details on any of these options, or perhaps help you compare their terms?

[USER] No I do not need.
[AGENT] Okay, Bhaskar. Do you have any other questions I can answer for you?
[USER] No I don't have any other questions.
[AGENT] Alright, Bhaskar. It was a pleasure assisting you today! If you need anything else in the future, please don't hesitate to reach out. Have a great day!
[USER] Thank You.

[USER] No.

leads.transcript:
[AGENT] Hi, I'm Riya from RupeeBoss Support. How can I help you today?
[USER] I want a personal loan.
[AGENT] Great! I can definitely help you with that. To get started, could you please provide your name and cell phone number? This will help me assist you better and also allow us to contact you later if needed.

[USER] Yeah, my name is Darshu Bhimgade. Mobile number is 9765031485.
[AGENT] Thank you, Darshu! I have your name and number. To help me find the best personal loan options for you, could you tell me a bit about your monthly net income, any existing monthly EMIs you're currently paying, your work experience, and if you happen to know your credit score?

[USER] Yeah, monthly income is Rs 37,000. EMI pay monthly is Rs 14,000 and civil score is Rs 675.
[AGENT] Thanks for the information, Darshu. Just to confirm, is your monthly income thirty-seven thousand rupees and your credit score six hundred and seventy-five? Also, how long have you been working?

[USER] 11 years.
[AGENT] Thank you, Darshu. Based on the information you've provided, you may be eligible for a personal loan. Our personal loans range from one lakh to seventy-five lakh rupees with interest rates from ten point twenty-five percent to fourteen percent, depending on your company category and monthly net income. The tenure can be from twelve months to sixty months, with a processing fee of point five zero percent to two percent. Would you like me to provide more details on the required documents or any other information?

[USER] Connect to customer care
[AGENT] I am sorry, I am an AI and I cannot connect you to customer care. However, I can provide you with more information regarding our loan products, eligibility criteria, and required documents. Would you like me to proceed with that?

[USER] No thank you.
[AGENT] Okay, Darshu. If you change your mind or have any other questions in the future, feel free to reach out. Have a great day!

[USER] मेरी एक existing logistic company है जिसका की सालाला turnover around 2.5 crore के आसपास है और मुझे अब अपने business को expand करना है और मुझे MSME का loan का requirement है up to 2 crore तक बिना collateral के और मैं इसमें यह भी चाहतا हूं कि जो मैं मुझे पैसा मिले MSME के द्वारה वो मैं इसका repayment एक सال के बात start करूँ
[AGENT] नमस्ते! आपकी सहायता करके मुझे बहुत खुशी होगी। मैं समझती हूँ कि आपकी एक लॉजिस्टिक्स कंपनी है जिसका सालाना टर्नओवर लगभग दो करोड़ पचास लाख है। आप अपने व्यवसाय को बढ़ाने के लिए दो करोड़ तक का एमएसएमई लोन बिना किसी सुरक्षा (collateral) के चाहते हैं, और आप चाहते हैं कि लोन का पुनर्भुगतान एक साल बाद शुरू हो।

इससे पहले कि मैं आपको सबसे अच्छी जानकारी दे सकूँ, क्या आप मुझे अपना नाम और फ़ोन नंबर बता सकते हैं? इससे मुझे आपकी ज़रूरतों के अनुसार सही लोन विकल्प खोजने में मदद मिलेगी।
[USER] मेरा नام Virendra Sharma है, and my mobile number is 9470599675
[AGENT] धन्यवाद, वीरेंद्र जी। आपका नाम और नंबर नोट कर लिया गया है।

मैं आपको बताना चाहती हूँ कि एमएसएमई लोन के लिए कुछ पात्रता मानदंड (eligibility criteria) होते हैं, जैसे कि कंपनी का टर्नओवर, लाभ, और क्रेडिट स्कोर। आमतौर पर, बिना किसी सुरक्षा के लोन के लिए, क्रेडिट स्कोर अच्छा होना चाहिए।

क्या आप मुझे अपनी कंपनी के बारे में कुछ और जानकारी दे सकते हैं, जैसे कि आपका क्रेडिट स्कोर क्या है और आपका व्यवसाय कितने सालों से चल रहा है? इससे मुझे यह समझने में मदद मिलेगी कि आपके लिए कौन सा लोन सबसे उपयुक्त रहेगा।
[USER] my business is going on for the last 5 years and my credit score is above 700
[AGENT] यह बहुत अच्छी बात है कि आपका व्यवसाय पिछले पांच सालों से चल रहा है और आपका क्रेडिट स्कोर सात सौ से ऊपर है। यह आपको एमएसएमई लोन के लिए एक अच्छा उम्मीदवार बनाता है।
आपके व्यवसाय को बढ़ाने के लिए, RupeeBoss आपको कई तरह के लोन विकल्प प्रदान कर सकता है। हम असुरक्षित बिजनेस लोन (Unsecured Business Loan), वर्किंग कैपिटल लोन (Working Capital Loan) और सीजीटीएमएसई लोन (CGTMSE Loan) जैसे लोन प्रदान करते हैं।असुरक्षित बिजनेस लोन आपको बिना किसी सुरक्षा के मिल सकता है, और वर्किंग कैपिटल लोन आपको अपने...

leads.summary: The user, Jonti Singh, contacted RupeeBoss Support seeking a loan for their new MSME. Initially interested in a working capital loan, Jonti clarified they are just starting their business. The agent s
leads.transcript:
[AGENT] Hi, I'm Riya from RupeeBoss Support. How can I help you today?
[USER] Hello.
[AGENT] Hi there! I'm doing great and I hope the same for you. To assist you better, could you please share your name and cell phone number? This will help me personalize our conversation and keep you updated.
[USER] Jonti Singh and my number is 8620973141.
[AGENT] Thank you, Jonti! It's great to have you with us. How can I help you with your loan needs today?

[USER] I need to start a loan.
[AGENT] ...
[USER] MSMEs
[AGENT] Okay, I can certainly help you with that! To get started, could you please clarify what type of loan you're interested in for your MSME? Are you looking for a secured business loan, an unsecured business loan, or perhaps a working capital loan?

[USER] Working capital loan.
[AGENT] Great choice, Jonti! A working capital loan can be very helpful for managing day-to-day operational costs.

These loans typically range from fifty lakhs to one hundred crores, with interest rates between nine and twelve percent depending on your business's risk profile. The repayment can be structured as monthly installments or an overdraft facility.

To check your eligibility, could you tell me how long your business has been operational, your credit score, and your annual turnover?

[USER] I didn't start my own business, alright. But I'm just a startup for my own business and my Sibyl score is 742 in Sibyl.com.
[AGENT] Thank you for the clarification, Jonti. Since you're just starting your business, you might not yet meet the minimum business vintage of one year that is typically required for a working capital loan. However, since you have a good CIBIL score of seven hundred forty-two, you may be eligible for an unsecured business loan.
Would you like me to provide...
[USER] Yep.
[AGENT] Okay, great! An unsecured business loan could be a good option for your startup. With this type of loan, you don't need to provide any collateral.The loan amount can range from five lakhs to seven crores, with interest rates from fifteen point ninety-nine percent to nineteen percent, depending on the loan...
[USER] That's great! That's great! Can you help me out for the unsecured business loan providing us? Can you help me out with the processor doing from the RupeeBoss?
[AGENT] I'm thrilled to hear you're interested! Yes, I can definitely guide you through the process.
First, let's gather a few details to check your eligibility. Could you please provide the following information?
One, what is your company or firm's turnover?Two, what are your existing monthly EMI...

leads.transcript:
[AGENT] Hi, I'm Riya from RupeeBoss Support. How can I help you...
[USER] Call me
[AGENT] I can definitely assist you with that! Before we proceed, could you please provide your name and cell phone number so I can arrange a call for you?

[USER] My name is Dr. Sudhir Sharma and my phone number is 981056444.
[AGENT] Thank you, Dr. Sudhir Sharma. I have your name and number. What is the reason for the call today?

[USER] MSME loan and other government schemes.
[AGENT] Great! We have the MSME Bharat Manch, which is a nationwide initiative to address the challenges faced by Micro, Small, and Medium Enterprises in India.

To better assist you with MSME loans and other government schemes, could you please provide a little more detail about your specific needs or questions?

[USER] Yes, tell me.
[AGENT] I'd be happy to! To give you the most relevant information, could you tell me what kind of information you're looking for regarding MSME loans and government schemes? For example, are you interested in eligibility criteria, the application process, or specific schemes?

[USER] Specific schemes.
[AGENT] Okay, I can help you with that! To provide you with the most relevant information on specific schemes, could you tell me a bit about your business? Knowing the nature of your business will help me identify the schemes that might be the best fit for you.

[USER] Pet boarding related and pet shops and other import-export services.
[AGENT] Thank you for that information! Based on your business, which includes pet boarding, pet shops, and import-export services, I can share some information.

RupeeBoss Financial Services Pvt Ltd has launched the MSME Bharat Manch, which aims to address the challenges faced by MSMEs by providing access to financial services, market linkages, and technology solutions. This initiative also focuses on uplifting underprivileged entrepreneurs and women-led businesses through mentorship, access to government schemes, and skill development.

Would you like to know more about the MSME Bharat Manch, or would you like me to look into specific government schemes that might be relevant to your business?

[USER] Yes, please call me.
[AGENT] I understand you'd prefer a call. Just to confirm, the number I have for you is nine eight one zero five six four four four. Is that correct?
[USER] No.
[AGENT] I apologize...
[USER] It's a 9810564441.
[AGENT] Thank you for the correction, Dr. Sharma. I now have your number as nine eight one zero five six four...

[AGENT] धन्यवाद, साहिल जी। पर्सनल लोन के लिए आपकी क्या आवश्यकताएं हैं? क्या आप कृपया अपनी मासिक आय, मौजूदा ईएमआई, कार्य अनुभव और क्रेडिट स्कोर के बारे में कुछ जानकारी दे सकते हैं?

leads.name: Madhav Verma
leads.title: Madhav contacted RupeeBoss seeking a government-backed MSME loan to expand his b
leads.summary: Madhav contacted RupeeBoss seeking a government-backed MSME loan to expand his business with a turnover of 15-20 lakhs, needing 60-70 lakhs in funding. Riya from RupeeBoss suggested exploring Unsecure
leads.transcript:
[AGENT] Hi, I'm Riya from RupeeBoss Support. How can I help you today?
[USER] I want to take a loan for MSME.
[AGENT] Great! We have several loan options for MSMEs. To assist you better, could you please share your name and cell phone number? Also, what type of loan are you looking for, and do you have any specific requirements in mind?
[USER] Yeah, so we require the loan from the government. So, is there any option that we can take the loan from the government or MSMEs
[AGENT] Yes, we can definitely explore options for government-backed loans for MSMEs. RupeeBoss offers assistance with MSME schemes and subsidies through the MSME Bharat Manch, which helps businesses access government schemes.

To check your eligibility and provide specific details, could you please provide your name and cell phone number? Also, can you tell me a bit more about your business, such as your company's turnover, business experience, and credit score if you know it?
[USER] Yeah, so my name is Madhav Verma and the contact number is 8527186288. Yeah, so our turnover is 15 to 20 lakhs. So we would like to enhance our business. So that's why we want the fund for till 60 to 70 lakhs so that we can spend it and we can increase our business.
[AGENT] Thank you, Madhav, for providing your information. I have saved your name and number.

Regarding your loan requirement, a turnover of fifteen to twenty lakhs and a funding need of sixty to seventy lakhs to enhance your business. I would suggest you to explore our Unsecured Business Loan and Working Capital Loan.

For the Unsecured Business Loan, the loan amount ranges from five lakhs to seven crores with interest rates from fifteen point ninety nine percent to nineteen percent, depending on the loan amount.

Alternatively, our Working Capital Loans range from fifty Lakhs to one hundred Crores, with interest rates typically between nine percent to twelve percent, depending on your business's risk profile.

Which loan product are you most interested in, or would you like me to provide more details on either of them?
[USER] Yeah, I would go to that the secured loans or not secured, unsecured loans.
[AGENT] Okay, you're interested in unsecured loans. With RupeeBoss, you can get an unsecured business loan without needing collateral, which provides quick and convenient financing for MSME businesses.

To proceed with the unsecured business loan, could you confirm your business experience in years and your existing monthly EMI, if any? This will help me determine the best options for you.
[USER] Yeah, so we have taken a loan. So,

leads.transcript:
[AGENT] Hi, I'm Riya from RupeeBoss Support. How can I help you today?
[USER] Can you tell me about the home loan process?
[AGENT] I would be happy to assist you with information on the home loan process. To start, could you please provide your name and cell phone number so I can assist you better and we can call you later?

[USER] My name is Juhi and my mobile number is 9022612512.
[AGENT] Thank you, Juhi.

Regarding the home loan process, are you interested in learning about the eligibility criteria, the required documents, or something else specifically?

[USER] What is the eligibility criteria?
[AGENT] For a home loan, the eligibility criteria include a minimum income of fifty thousand rupees and a credit score of six hundred eighty or higher. Would you like me to provide more details on any other specific requirements, such as those related to the property?

[USER] Can you just tell me what all kind of loans you provide?
[AGENT] We offer a comprehensive selection of loan products to cater to various needs, including home loans, personal loans, business loans, and more. We also offer car loans, car refinance loans, credit cards, working capital loans, CGTMSE loans, loans for professionals, and loan against property.

Is there any particular type of loan you're interested in?
[USER] Can you tell me more about the car loan?
[AGENT] Certainly! With Rupee Boss, you can finance your dream car. We go beyond just the cheapest option and tailor the best car loan to suit your needs and preferences.

Is there anything specific you'd like to know about car loans, such as eligibility, interest rates, or the application process?

[USER] The application process?
[AGENT] The general process involves an initial inquiry where our team assists you with loan options, document submission, verification by our experts, and then loan disbursal upon successful approval.

To give you more specific information, are you currently employed or self-employed?

[USER] I'm a self-employed person.
[AGENT] Okay, thank you for letting me know.

For self-employed individuals, the documents generally needed are KYC documents, business documents, income proof, address proof of business, and property-related documents. Would you like a more detailed list?

[USER] Can you tell me about what all documents would I require?
[AGENT] For a self-employed individual, you'll typically need KYC documents such as your Aadhaar card, PAN card, and a passport-sized photograph. You'll also need business documents like your business registration certificate, GST registration certificate, and trade license. For income proof, we require your profit and loss account and balance sheet for the last two years, as well as your ITR returns for the last two years. Additionally, you'll need address proof for your business, such as a utility bill or lease agreement, and property-related documents like the title deed and sale...

leads.transcript:
[AGENT] Hi, I'm Riya from RupeeBoss Support. How can I help you today?
[USER] Get a loan.
[AGENT] Great! I'd be happy to help you get a loan. Could you please share your name and cell phone number so I can assist you better and keep you updated on upcoming loan schemes?
[USER] My number is 9080379054. Name is Subhana Qadri.
[AGENT] Thank you, Subhana. I've noted your details. Could you please let me know what type of loan you're interested in? For example, personal loan, business loan, home loan, or loan against property?
[USER] Business loan.
[AGENT] Perfect, Subhana. For a business loan, we offer options like Unsecured Business Loan, Working Capital Loan, and Loan Against Property. Could you let me know your business turnover, net profit, and whether you have a credit score of 680 or above? This will help me find the best fit for you.
[USER] My annual turnover is above 60 lakhs And my credit score is 745
[AGENT] Thank you for sharing those details, Subhana. With a turnover above 60 lakhs and a credit score of 745, you’re well-qualified for an Unsecured Business Loan. The loan amount can go up to ₹7 crores, with interest rates starting from 15.99%, and a tenure of 12 to 36 months.  

Would you like me to guide you through the next steps to apply?
[USER] Yes, sure
[AGENT] Great, Subhana! To proceed, I’ll need a few details:  
- Business experience in years  
- Existing monthly EMI (if any)  
- Whether you’re a proprietorship, partnership, or private limited company  

Also, please confirm if you have your business’s last two years’ ITR, GST returns, and 12-month bank statements ready. This will help us speed up the process.
[USER] I have 12 months of bank statements and
[AGENT] Thank you for confirming, Subhana. Since you have your 12-month bank statements ready, that’s a great start. To move forward, could you please share:  
- Your business experience in years  
- Any existing monthly EMI you’re paying  
- The type of business entity you have (proprietorship, partnership, or private limited)?  

This will help me tailor the best loan option for you.
[USER] My business is a proprietorship and I have two years of experience and there is no EMI. I have zero EMI right now.
[AGENT] Thank you for the details, Subhana. With your proprietorship business, two years of experience, no existing EMI, and strong financials, you’re a great fit for an Unsecured Business Loan.  

We’ll need the following documents:  
1. PAN Card, Aadhaar Card, and office address proof  
2. Business license and GST certificate  
3. Last two years’ ITR with audit reports and current year’s sales figures  
4. 12-month business bank statements  
5. Last 12 months of GST returns  

Would you like me to guide you through the online application process now?

leads.title: Mr
leads.summary: Mr. Jain contacted RupeeBoss Support seeking a 50 lakh unsecured business loan. He provided his name and phone number. The agent outlined the loan requirements, including turnover, profit, and credit
leads.transcript:
[AGENT] Hi, I'm Riya from RupeeBoss Support. How can I help you today?
[USER] I want a business loan.
[AGENT] Great! I'd be happy to help you with a business loan. Could you please share your name and cell phone number so we can keep you updated on the upcoming loan schemes?
[USER] My name is Jain. Mobile number is 9927059114
[AGENT] Thank you, Mr. Jain. I've noted your details. Could you please let me know what type of business loan you're interested in—unsecured, secured, working capital, or something else? Also, do you have a specific loan amount in mind?
[USER] Unsecured loan of 50 lakhs.
[AGENT] Thank you for the details, Mr. Jain. For an unsecured business loan of 50 lakhs, here are the key details:  
- Interest Rate: 15.99% to 19% (depending on your loan amount and profile)  
- Tenure: 12 to 36 months  
- Minimum Requirements:  
  - Business turnover of ₹50 lakhs or more  
  - Net profit of ₹5 lakhs or above  
  - Credit score of 680 or higher  

To proceed, we’ll need the following:  
1. Business turnover and net profit details  
2. Your business experience (in years)  
3. Existing monthly EMI (if any)  
4. Credit score (if known)  

Would you like to share these details now?
[USER] Yes.
[AGENT] Great, thank you for sharing, Mr. Jain. To move forward, could you please confirm:  
1. Your business turnover in the last financial year?  
2. Your net profit after tax?  
3. How many years of business experience do you have?  
4. Do you have an existing monthly EMI?  

This will help us assess your eligibility quickly.
[USER] Yes, turnover last financial year 4 crore 70 lakhs.
[AGENT] Thank you for sharing, Mr. Jain. Your turnover of 4 crore 70 lakhs is well above the minimum requirement. To proceed further, could you please share:  
1. Your net profit after tax for the last financial year?  
2. How many years of business experience do you have?  
3. Do you have any existing monthly EMI?  

This will help us finalize your loan eligibility and next steps.
[USER] Net profit approximately 2 lakhs.
[AGENT] Thank you for the...
[USER] . EMI
[AGENT] Thank you for sharing, Mr. Jain. Your net profit of approximately 2 lakhs is below the minimum requirement of 5 lakhs for an unsecured business loan. However, we may still be able to assist you with alternative options such as a secured loan against property or a business loan with collateral.  

Would you like me to explore these options for you? Alternatively, if you have any other documents or details that could support your application, please let me know.

[AGENT] Could you please...

leads.name: Unknown
leads.title: Saritha contacted the agent, Riya, and provided her name and phone number
leads.summary: Saritha contacted the agent, Riya, and provided her name and phone number. Saritha is interested in a personal loan. Riya provided details on loan amounts, interest rates, terms, eligibility, and requ
leads.transcript:
[AGENT] வணக்கம், நான் ரியா. இன்று உங்களுக்கு எப்படி உதவலாம்?
[USER] என்னுடைய பெயரே சரீதா. மொபைல் நமபர் 6374335772.
[AGENT] வணக்கம் சரீதா! உங்கள் பெயர் மற்றும் மொபைல் எண் பதிவு செய்யப்பட்டுள்ளது. உங்களுக்கு ஏதேனும் கடன் தேவையா? அல்லது எங்கள் கடன் திட்டங்கள் பற்றி தெரிந்து கொள்ள விரும்புகிறீர்களா?
[USER] இல்லை, எனக்கு கடன் வேணடும்.
[AGENT] வணக்கம் சரீதா! உங்களுக்கு தேவையான கடன் வகையை நான் உங்களுக்கு விளக்கமாக சொல்லலாம். உங்களுக்கு எந்த வகை கடன் தேவை? உதாரணமாக, தனிப்பட்ட கடன், வணிக கடன், வீடு கடன் அல்லது கார் கடன் போன்றவை. உங்கள் தேவைகளை சொல்லுங்கள், நான் உங்களுக்கு சரியான தேர்வை வழங்குகிறேன்.
[USER] தனிபெட्ட கடன்.
[AGENT] வணக்கம் சரீதா! தனிப்பட்ட கடனுக்கான விவரங்களை உங்களுக்கு சொல்கிறேன்.  

- கடன் தொகை: ரூபாய் ஒரு லட்சத்திலிருந்து ரூபாய் எழுபத்தைந்து லட்சம் வரை  
- வட்டி விகிதம்: 10.25% முதல் 14% வரை (உங்கள் மாதாந்திர சம்பளத்தின் அடிப்படையில்)  
- கால அளவு: 12 மாதங்கள் முதல் 60 மாதங்கள் வரை  
- கடன் தொகை பெறுவதற்கான நேரம்: 2 முதல் 4 நாட்கள்  

உங்களுக்கு தகுதி உள்ளதா? உங்கள் மாதாந்திர சம்பளம் ரூபாய் முப்பதாயிரத்துக்கு மேல் இருக்க வேண்டும், மேலும் கிரெடிட் ஸ்கோர் 680 க்கு மேல் இருக்க வேண்டும்.  

உங்களுக்கு தேவையான ஆவணங்கள் பற்றி தெரிந்து கொள்ள விரும்புகிறீர்களா?
[USER] ஆமாம்.
[AGENT] வணக்கம் சரீதா! தனிப்பட்ட கடனுக்கான தேவையான ஆவணங்கள் பற்றி இங்கே விளக்கமாக சொல்கிறேன்:

1. KYC ஆவணங்கள்:  
   - ஆதார் அட்டை (அல்லது பாஸ்போர்ட், வாக்குச்சீட்டு, டிரைவிங் லைசென்ஸ்)  
   - பான் கார்டு (அனைத்து நிதி பரிமாற்றங்களுக்கும் அவசியம்)  
   - பாஸ்போர்ட் அளவு புகைப்படம் (சமீபத்தியது)  
   - நிறுவன அடையாள அட்டை (நிறுவனத்தின் பெயர் மற்றும் அடையாளம்)  
   - வீட்டு முகவரி சான்று (நிலையான முகவரி சான்று)

2. வருமான ஆவணங்கள்:  
   - கடந்த 3 மாதங்களுக்கான சம்பள சீட்டுகள்  
   - கடந்த 2 ஆண்டுகளுக்கான ஃபாரம் 16  
   - புதிதாக சேர்ந்த பணியாளர்களுக்கு பணியாளர் அறிவிப்பு கடிதம்

3. வங்கி கணக்கு ஆவணங்கள்:  
   - கடந்த 6 மாதங்களுக்கான சம்பள கடன் கணக்கு பின்னடைவு ஆவணம்

4. கடன் ஆவணங்கள் (இருந்தால்):  
   - கடன் அனுமதி கடிதங்கள் மற்றும் SOA (சமீபத்திய கடன் பின்னடைவு ஆவணம்)

உங்களுக்கு இந்த ஆவணங்கள் எல்லாம் இருக்கிறதா? அல்லது எந்த ஆவணத்தில் சிக்கல் இருக்கிறதா என்று சொல்லுங்கள், நான் உதவ முடியும்.
[USER] இல்லை, எந्த சிகழும் இல·
[AGENT] வணக்கம் சரீதா! நீங்கள் சிக்கல் இல்லாமல் இருப்பதை நல்லதாக நினைக்கிறேன். உங்களுக்கு தேவையான கடன் தொகை மற்றும் கால அளவு பற்றி தெரிந்து கொள்ள விரும்புகிறீர்களா? அல்லது கடன் விண்ணப்பத்தை தொடங்க விரும்புகிறீர்களா?

leads.transcript:
[AGENT] नमस्ते, मैं रिया हूँ। आज मैं आपकी कैसे मदद कर सकती हूँ?
[USER] जी, बिल्कुल नए बिजनस को सुरू करने के लिए हम मुझे लोन लेना है मैंसेमी. उसके लिए मुझे क्या-क्या डोक्यमेंत आ�
[AGENT] बिल्कुल, आपके नए बिजनस के लिए लोन लेने के लिए आपको कुछ महत्वपूर्ण दस्तावेज़ तैयार करने होंगे। आपको निम्नलिखित दस्तावेज़ चाहिए:

1. पहचान प्रमाण (KYC):  
   - आधार कार्ड (या पासपोर्ट, वोटर आईडी, ड्राइविंग लाइसेंस)  
   - पैन कार्ड (सभी वित्तीय लेनदेन के लिए अनिवार्य)  
   - हाल की पासपोर्ट साइज़ फोटो

2. व्यापार संबंधी दस्तावेज़:  
   - व्यापार पंजीकरण प्रमाणपत्र (पार्टनरशिप दस्तावेज़, कंपनी निगमन प्रमाणपत्र आदि)  
   - जीएसटी पंजीकरण प्रमाणपत्र  
   - व्यापार लाइसेंस  
   - पिछले 2 वर्षों के लेखांकन विवरण (लाभ और हानि खाता, बैलेंस शीट)  
   - पिछले 2 वर्षों के आयकर रिटर्न (ITR)  
   - पिछले 6 महीनों के बैंक खाते के बयान  
   - व्यापार के अनुभव का प्रमाण (कम से कम 2 वर्ष)

3. आय प्रमाण:  
   - पिछले 2 वर्षों के लाभ और हानि खाता  
   - पिछले 2 वर्षों की बैलेंस शीट  
   - पिछले 2 वर्षों के आयकर रिटर्न (ITR)

4. व्यापार के पते का प्रमाण:  
   - व्यापार स्थल का उपयोगिता बिल (बिजली, पानी आदि)  
   - यदि भाड़े पर है तो किराया समझौता  
   - निगमन प्रमाणपत्र (निगमित व्यापार के लिए)

leads.summary: Sneha contacted Ria for a new startup business loan of 4 lakhs. Ria initially outlined requirements for an unsecured business loan but then suggested a CGTMSE loan, suitable for new entrepreneurs with
leads.transcript:
[AGENT] नमस्ते, मैं रिया हूँ। आज मैं आपकी कैसे मदद कर सकती हूँ?
[USER] अक्शली, मैंने एक new startup loan चाहिए बिजनिस के लिये और मेरा नाम स्नीहा पैंडल है, मेरा phone number 9318391500 है.
[AGENT] नमस्ते स्नीहा, धन्यवाद आपके संपर्क करने के लिए। आपके लिए नए स्टार्टअप के लिए बिजनेस लोन के लिए बहुत अच्छी खबर है। हम आपको अनसिक्योर्ड बिजनेस लोन के विकल्प दे सकते हैं, जिसके लिए आपको कोई गारंटी या संपत्ति की आवश्यकता नहीं है।

इस लोन के लिए आपके पास निम्नलिखित आवश्यकताएं होनी चाहिए:
- कम से कम 50 लाख रुपये वार्षिक टर्नओवर
- कम से कम 5 लाख रुपये वार्षिक निवल लाभ

[AGENT] स्नीहा, आपके नए स्टार्टअप के लिए लोन के लिए बहुत अच्छी खबर है। हम आपको एक विशेष लोन विकल्प प्रदान कर सकते हैं, जिसे हम "CGTMSE लोन" कहते हैं। यह लोन नए उद्यमियों के लिए बहुत उपयुक्त है, जिसमें आपको कोई गारंटी या संपत्ति की...
[USER] Thank you.
[AGENT] आपका स्वागत है, स्नीहा! आपके लिए नए स्टार्टअप के लिए CGTMSE लोन के विकल्प के बारे में जानकारी देने के लिए बहुत खुशी हुई। यह लोन आपके बिना किसी गारंटी के लिए उपलब्ध है और आपके व्यवसाय के विकास में मदद करेगा।

अगर आपको आगे कोई मदद चाहिए, जैसे लोन के लिए आवेदन करने में सहायता या आवश्यक दस्तावेजों की सूची, तो बस बताएं। मैं आपकी पूरी मदद करूंगी।

leads.title: Swapna contacted Riya from RupeeBoss Support to inquire about a business loan
leads.summary: Swapna contacted Riya from RupeeBoss Support to inquire about a business loan. Swapna wanted to know the loan amount she could apply for. Riya collected Swapna's details and business information, then
leads.transcript:
[AGENT] Hi, I'm Riya from RupeeBoss Support. How can I help you today?
[USER] Yeah, hello Riya. I want a business loan. What will be the loan amount which I can apply for?
[AGENT] Hi there! I'm happy to help you with that. क्या आपके पास इन दस्तावेजों में से कुछ हैं? या आप इन्हें तैयार कर सकते हैं?

[AGENT] ठीक है, नुरालम जी। अगर आपके पास इन दस्तावेजों के अभाव में भी लोन लेना है, तो हम आपकी मदद कर सकते हैं। आपकी जमीन के लिए टाइटल डीड और रजिस्ट्री दस्तावेज बहुत महत्वपूर्ण हैं, लेकिन अगर आपके पास नहीं हैं, तो हम आपको इन्हें तैयार करने में मदद कर सकते हैं।

क्या आप बता सकते हैं कि आपकी जमीन कहाँ स्थित है? और क्या आपके पास जमीन के लिए कोई खरीदारी का समझौता (Sale Agreement) या अन्य दस्तावेज हैं? इससे हम आगे की प्रक्रिया को समझ सकते हैं।

leads.summary: Riya from RupeeBoss Support is assisting Asma Parveen and Amal (same phone number) with business loan inquiries. Asma's business is only six months old, so Riya suggests exploring working capital loan
leads.transcript:
[AGENT] Hi, I'm Riya from RupeeBoss Support. How can I help you today?
[USER] Business loan.
[AGENT] Great! I can help you with information about our business loan options. Could you please share your name and cell phone number so I can assist you better and keep you updated on upcoming loan schemes?
[USER] 9620551047
[AGENT] Thank you for sharing your number, Mr. Sharma. Could you please confirm your name so I can proceed with your query?
[USER] Asma Parveen
[AGENT] Thank you, Asma. I'm glad to assist you with your business loan query. We offer unsecured business loans for self-employed individuals, with loan amounts ranging from ₹5 lakhs to ₹7 crores, competitive interest rates, and a processing time of 4 to 7 days. Would you like details on eligibility criteria or required documents?
[USER] Okay.
[AGENT] Great! For an unsecured business loan, you’ll need to meet the following eligibility criteria: a minimum annual turnover of ₹50 lakhs, a net profit of ₹5 lakhs or more, and a credit score of 680 or above. Additionally, we’ll require documents like your last two years’ ITR with financials, bank statements for the last 12 months, GST returns, and business registration details. Would you like to proceed with checking your eligibility?

[AGENT] Thank you, Asma. To move forward, could you please share your business’s annual turnover and your current credit score, if known? This will help me assess your eligibility and guide you through the next steps.

Would you like me to provide details on working capital loans or discuss other options suitable for your business stage?
[USER] ...
[AGENT] Hello,...
[USER] Hello, Amal!
[AGENT] Hi Amal! How can I assist you today?
[USER] Please do my working capital loan, otherwise business loan.
[AGENT] Hello Amal! I’d be happy to help you with a working capital loan. To proceed, could you please share your business name, the nature of your business, and your annual turnover? Also, kindly confirm your contact number so I can keep you updated on the process.

[AGENT] Thank you, Amal. I’ve noted your contact number. Could you please share your business name and annual turnover so I can check your eligibility for a working capital loan?...

leads.name: Unknown
leads.title: Amit inquired about RupeeBoss and its services
leads.summary: Amit inquired about RupeeBoss and its services. Riya explained RupeeBoss's loan offerings, including personal, home, car, and business loans, and highlighted the MSME Bharat Manch initiative. Amit the
leads.transcript:
[AGENT] Hi, I'm Riya from RupeeBoss Support. How can I help you today?
[USER] Yeah. Hi, Rhea. I needed, uh, to know about, uh, RupeeBoss and what they do.
[AGENT] Hi Rhea! I'm Riya, and I'd be happy to help you learn more about RupeeBoss. We're a financial services company that helps individuals and businesses access quick, hassle-free loans. We offer a variety of loan products like personal loans, business loans, home loans, car loans, and even credit cards. Our services are designed to be fast, transparent, and customer-friendly, with online applications and quick disbursal. We also have a special initiative called MSME Bharat Manch to support small businesses and entrepreneurs across India.  

Could you please share your name and cell phone number...
[USER] Can you tell me more about, uh, MSME Bharat Manas?
[AGENT] I'm sorry, but I believe you meant "MSME Bharat Manch" — that's...
[USER] That's correct.
[AGENT] Great! MSME Bharat Manch is a nationwide initiative by Rupeeboss Financial Services Pvt Ltd. It's designed to support Micro, Small, and Medium Enterprises (MSMEs) across India. The program helps these businesses by providing easy access to financial services, market linkages, and technology solutions. It also focuses on empowering underprivileged entrepreneurs and women-led businesses through mentorship, access to government subsidies, and skill development.  

Our goal is to help MSMEs grow sustainably, create more jobs, and contribute to...
[USER] Okay. What are the different types of loan that you give?
[AGENT] We offer a wide range of loan products tailored to different needs. These include Personal Loans for travel, weddings, or emergencies; Home Loans to help you buy your dream home; Car Loans for financing your vehicle; Loan Against Property to unlock the value of your real estate; Unsecured Business Loans for self-employed individuals and MSMEs; Working Capital Loans to manage daily operations; and even specialized loans for professionals like doctors, architects, and chartered accountants.  

We also provide credit cards, balance transfer options, and loan refinancing solutions.  

Could you please share your name and cell phone number so I can keep you updated on upcoming loan schemes?
[USER] Yeah. My, uh, name is Amit and my number is 9820370456.
[AGENT] Thank you, Amit! I’ve noted your details, and we’ll be in touch soon with information about upcoming loan schemes that match your needs. Is there anything specific you’d like to know about any of the loan types we offer?
[USER] No, thank you.

leads.summary: The user, Akash Shirshikar, inquired about a RupeeBoss franchisee opportunity. He provided his mobile number (7829217781), location (Shirshi), and email (akashshirshikar638@gmail.com). He has a bankin
leads.transcript:
[AGENT] Hi, I'm Riya from RupeeBoss Support. Main apki kaise madad kar sakti hu?
[USER] [गला साफ करते हुए] About franchisee. About franchisee.
[AGENT] ठीक है. Franchisee के बारे में आप RupeeBoss का franchise लेना चाहते हैं या किसी existing franchisee से related कोई query है? आगे बढ़ने से पहले आपकी help better तरीके से करने के लिए, आपका नाम और आपका mobile number बता दीजिए. साथ में आप कौन से शहर में franchisee लेना चाह रहे हैं, और क्या आपके पास office space और investment budget roughly कितना है?
[USER] नाम आकाश शिर्षिकर। मोबाइल नंबर 7829217781। लोकेशन शिर्षी।
[AGENT] [happy] धन्यवाद आकाश जी. Mobile number नोट कर लिया, और location शिर्षी. अब franchisee के लिए मैं आपकी requirement समझ लूं तो सही guidance दे पाऊंगी. आप RupeeBoss का loan franchisee या DSA type association करना चाहते हैं, या full office based franchise setup?

बस ये बताइए: आपका approx investment budget क्या है, आपके पास office space already है या arrange करना होगा, और आपका background sales banking finance में है या new हैं? इसके बाद मैं आपको next steps और process clear बता दूंगी.
[USER] [बातचीत की आवाज़] Background बैंकिंग से ही हूँ मैं। Location भी शिरशी चाहिए था और amount भी फाइव लाख है budget। Office work ढूंढ रहा हूँ।
[AGENT] ठीक है आकाश जी, banking background plus शिर्षी location और करीब five lakh budget के साथ franchisee ya DSA association के लिए profile अच्छी लग रही है. Office space अगर अभी final नहीं है तो भी चल जाएगा, पहले हम basic onboarding और territory feasibility check करवा देते हैं, फिर office finalize कर सकते हैं.

मैं आपको process आगे बढ़ाने के लिए दो चीज़ और confirm कर लूं: आप franchisee में loan products focus करना चाहते हैं जैसे business loan, LAP, home loan, personal loan, या all products? और आप full time dedicate करेंगे या part time? जैसे ही आप confirm करेंगे, मैं आपकी details हमारी franchise team के पास share करके callback arrange करवा दूंगी. क्या आप callback आज चाहिए या कल?
[USER] [हँसना] आज चाहिए full time business ढूंढ रहा था मैं। Office open करके business loan, personal loan सभी customers को देने के लिए।
[AGENT] बहुत बढ़िया आकाश जी, full time और all products focus के साथ setup जल्दी scale हो सकता है. मैं आपकी details franchise team को अभी forward करवा देती हूँ ताकि आज ही callback हो जाए.

Callback के लिए बस दो quick confirmations: आपको call किस time window में comfortable रहेगा, और आपका email id या alternate number है क्या, ताकि documents and onboarding details share हो जाएं? इसके बाद, क्या मैं आपकी और किसी चीज़ में help कर दूँ?
[USER] आज ही मीटिंग अरेंज कर दीजिए। मेरा ऐसे नंबर पर कीजिए, एक ही नंबर है मेरा और मेल आईडी आकाश सिरसीकर सिक्सटी थ्री एट जीमेल डॉट कॉम।
[AGENT] ठीक है आकाश जी, मैंने आपकी meeting request आज के लिए mark कर दी है. Details: नाम आकाश शिर्षिकर, mobile seven eight two nine two one seven seven eight one, location शिर्षी, budget करीब five lakh, full time, products business loan और personal loan plus other loan products. Email: आकाश सिरसीकर six three eight at gmail dot com. हमारी franchise team आज ही इसी number पर call करके meeting slot confirm कर देगी. क्या इसके अलावा मैं आपकी किसी और चीज़ में help कर दूँ?

leads.title: Guldeep from Kathal, Haryana, sought a business loan (₹50k-₹1L) for a new online
leads.summary: Guldeep from Kathal, Haryana, sought a business loan (₹50k-₹1L) for a new online selling venture. The agent noted that his lack of current income makes an unsecured loan difficult, suggesting Loan Aga
leads.transcript:
[AGENT] Hi, I'm Riya from RupeeBoss Support. Main apki kaise madad kar sakti hu?
[USER] Ma'am, main Kathal, Haryana se bol raha hoon aur main ek business start karne ke liye loan lena chahta hoon.
[AGENT] [happy] बिल्कुल, Kathal जी, मैं आपकी help कर देती हूँ business loan के लिए. आगे बढ़ने से पहले, क्या मैं आपका पूरा नाम और आपका mobile number ले सकती हूँ?

और साथ में बस ये भी बताइए: आप कौन सा business start करने वाले हैं, कितनी loan amount चाहिए, और आपका current monthly income या अगर existing business है तो approximate monthly sales या yearly turnover कितना है?
[USER] मैम मेरा नाम गुलदीप है और मेरा mobile number 9729590464 है और मैं एक new business अ- online selling का शुरू करना चाहता हूँ जैसे कि Meesho, Flipkart पे अपने product sale करके अ- income generate करना जैसा एक business शुरू करना चाहता हूँ और currently अभी मेरे पास कोई income नहीं है। मैं job पर था जो कि मैं छोड़ चुका हूँ। अभी business start करने के लिए मुझे loan चाहिए।
[AGENT] ठीक है [slow] गुलदीप जी, thanks. आपका number मैंने note कर लिया है.

आपके case में क्योंकि अभी currently income नहीं है और new business start करना है, unsecured business loan में generally eligibility income और business vintage पर depend करती है, तो approval tough हो सकता है. आपके लिए practical options ये हो सकते हैं: अगर आपके पास residential या commercial property है तो Loan Against Property, या फिर अगर कोई co applicant है जिनकी stable income हो, तो personal loan route explore किया जा सकता है.

मैं आपको सही option suggest कर पाऊँ, इसके लिए तीन चीज़ बताइए: आपकी age कितनी है, क्या आपके या family में किसी के नाम पर property है, और loan amount roughly कितनी चाहिए?
[USER] मैम मेरे को बिल्कुल minimum सी loan अ- business start करने के लिए loan amount पचास हजार से एक लाख के बीच चाहिए है। और मैं ये पूछना चाहता हूँ कि जैसे मैं मेरी wife के नाम से कोई महिला के नाम से scheme हो, वैसा आप दिलवा सकते हो तो कुछ suggest कर दीजिए।
[AGENT] गुलदीप जी, समझ गया. पचास हजार से एक लाख जैसी छोटी amount के लिए banks और NBFC usually तब ही approve करते हैं जब applicant की regular income या existing business proof हो, तो आपके current no income वाले case में direct unsecured loan difficult रहेगा.

Women scheme वाली बात पर, RupeeBoss के through हम loan products arrange करते हैं, government subsidy या specific women scheme directly “दिलवाना” promise नहीं करूँगी. लेकिन हाँ, अगर आपकी wife की income proof है या वो self employed हैं, तो उनके नाम पर personal loan या small business loan explore किया जा सकता है, और अगर property wife के नाम पर है तो Loan Against Property best chance देता है.

आगे बढ़ने के लिए आपकी wife से related तीन details चाहिए: क्या वो working हैं या business करती हैं, उनकी approx monthly income कितनी है, और उनका credit score roughly पता है या कोई existing EMI चल रही है?
[USER] [सांस अंदर लेते हुए] वो मैम currently अपनी shop चलाती हैं local जो ये होती है अपना beauty parlour की, लेकिन उनका ना तो य-य-ये PAN card है और ना ही उनकी कुछ income show कर रखी है, बस वो अपना locally काम करती हैं।
[AGENT] ठीक है गुलदीप जी. अगर आपकी wife के पास PAN नहीं है और income proof भी नहीं है, तो bank या NBFC से loan approve कराना practically possible नहीं होता, क्योंकि KYC और repayment capacity proof mandatory रहता है. सबसे पहले आपको उनके लिए PAN बनवाना होगा, और फिर basic documentation build करना होगा जैसे bank account में regular credits दिखें, और अगर possible हो तो GST या simple books.

Quickly आगे बढ़ने के लिए मैं ये confirm कर लूँ: क्या आपकी wife के नाम पर bank account है जिसमें parlour की daily या weekly earnings deposit होती हैं, और आपके या family में किसी के पास property है जो collateral के तौर पर use हो सके?
[USER] हम्म, family में property father के नाम है जो कि मैं collateral के तौर पर use नहीं करना चाहता ma'am, लेकिन मैं ये पूछना चाहता हूँ कि मान लो जो उनके bank account भी नहीं है मेरी wife का, अभी अगर मैं document तैयार करवाता हूँ तो मेरे को loan लेने के लिए क्या-क्या suitable document ready करवाने होंगे?
[AGENT] गुलदीप जी, अगर आप documents ready करके future में loan eligibility बनाना चाहते हैं, तो सबसे पहले basic KYC और banking trail create करना होगा.

आपकी wife के लिए minimum ये ready कराइए: PAN card, Aadhaar, photo, और एक savings bank account जिसमें parlour की income regularly deposit हो. उसके बाद lenders आम तौर पर last six to twelve months bank statement, और at least two years ITR ask करते हैं; अगर business side stronger दिखानी है तो GST registration और last twelve months GST returns helpful होते हैं, plus shop address proof जैसे rent agreement या utility bill.

आप चाहें तो मैं checklist आपकी exact situation के हिसाब से finalize कर दूँ, बस ये बताइए: parlour shop rented है या owned, और आप loan wife के नाम पर लेना चाह रहे हैं या अपने नाम पर?
[USER] नाम मैं wife के नाम पर ही देख रहा हूँ और क्या कहते हैं जो shop है हमारी वो owned है जो कि father के नाम पे property है उसमें है।
[AGENT] समझ गया गुलदीप जी. Wife के नाम पर loan explore करने के लिए, क्योंकि shop space father के नाम वाली property में है, तो address proof और business proof सही तरीके से set करना पड़ेगा, और wife का banking trail सबसे important रहेगा.

Wife के नाम पर suitable documents आप ये ready करवा लीजिए: PAN card, Aadhaar, photo, residence proof. फिर wife के नाम पर bank account open करके parlour की सारी receipts उसी में deposit कराइए, ताकि minimum six months का statement बन सके. Business proof के लिए shop का ownership father के नाम है तो एक simple consent या NOC type letter plus property tax or electricity bill से address establish किया जा सकता है, और अगर possible हो तो trade license या local registration भी. आगे चलकर ITR file करना और basic income records रखना approval chance बढ़ा देगा.

आप चाहें तो मैं next step के तौर पर आपकी wife की eligibility check करवा दूँ, लेकिन उसके लिए monthly income estimate चाहिए. Approx parlour से monthly average receipts कितनी हो जाती हैं, और क्या कोई existing EMI आपकी wife के नाम पर चल रही है?
[USER] नहीं, existing- existing EMI कोई नहीं चल रही है और जो अपना receiving है normal वो चार सौ, पाँच सौ रुपए daily की है।
[AGENT] ठीक है गुलदीप जी. Daily चार सौ से पाँच सौ के हिसाब से roughly monthly income बारह हजार के आसपास बनती है, और अभी PAN plus bank statement trail नहीं है, इसलिए अभी immediate loan approval tough रहेगा.

Best next step ये रहेगा कि पहले wife का PAN बन जाए और bank account open हो जाए, फिर कम से कम छह months तक daily earnings consistently account में deposit हों. उसके बाद हम personal loan route check कर सकते हैं; हमारी eligibility guideline के हिसाब से personal loan में minimum monthly net income around तीस हजार plus और credit score six eighty plus typically चाहिए, तो उस benchmark तक income proof build करना पड़ेगा. अगर income बढ़ जाए या co applicant जोड़ें तो chances improve होंगे.

आप चाहें तो मैं आपको process simplify करके बता दूँ, but पहले ये बताइए: क्या आप loan जल्दी, मतलब अगले एक से दो महीनों में चाहिए, या आप six months documentation build करने के लिए ready हैं?
[USER] मैम, female के लिए हरियाणा में कोई ऐसा product नहीं है कि वो अगर नया business start करना चाहती हैं तो वो कर सकें, कोई loan ऐसा मिल जाए कि उसमें कुछ भी collateral या unsecured loan हमको मिल जाए।
[AGENT] गुलदीप जी, मैं समझ सकती हूँ आप जल्दी start करना चाहते हैं, लेकिन honestly बोलूँ तो बिना income proof, बिना PAN, और बिना banking trail के किसी भी state में banks या NBFC unsecured loan usually approve नहीं करते, चाहे applicant female हो या male. Haryana में government side पर women entrepreneurship के लिए कुछ schemes होती हैं, पर वो mostly specific department through, eligibility, margin money, training, और documentation के साथ चलती हैं; RupeeBoss उनके approvals directly process नहीं करता.

RupeeBoss के loan products में जो realistic routes हैं वो ये रहेंगे: wife के नाम पर loan तभी feasible होगा जब basic KYC plus bank statement trail बन जाए; या फिर अगर आप collateral consider करें तो Loan Against Property में chances बेहतर होते हैं. तीसरा option co applicant with stable income जोड़ना, जिससे personal loan explore हो सके.

मैं आपको सही दिशा देने के लिए बस दो quick सवाल पूछूँ: क्या आपकी wife PAN बनवाने और bank account start करने के लिए ready हैं, और क्या...

leads.transcript:
[AGENT] Hi, I'm Riya from RupeeBoss Support. Main apki kaise madad kar sakti hu?
[USER] [गला साफ करते हुए] Abhi aapke aur meri baat chit ho rahi thi. Call
[AGENT] [calm] हाँ बिल्कुल, call पर ही हैं। आपकी help के लिए बस आपका नाम और आपका phone number बता दीजिए, ताकि मैं आगे details check करके सही guidance दे सकूँ। आप किस type का loan देख रहे हैं, personal loan या business loan, और approximate amount कितना चाहिए?
[USER] मेरा नाम आशीष कुमार है और phone number है 7061740105 और मैं unsecured loan चाह रहा हूँ इसमें और approximate amount minimum है 5 to 10 lakhs something, 10 lakh 5 to between 5 to 10 lakhs।

Eligibility confirm करने के लिए मुझे बस दो तीन details चाहिए: आप salaried हैं या self employed, आपकी monthly net income कितनी है, और आपका approximate credit score पता है क्या? साथ में यह भी बताइए कि कोई existing EMI चल रही है क्या और कितनी.

जैसे ही ये details मिलेंगी, मैं आपके लिए best offers और expected EMI range quickly share कर दूँगी.

[AGENT] [calm] ठीक है आशीष जी. Unsecured Business Loan के हिसाब से हमारे criteria में minimum turnover सालाना पचास लाख और net profit कम से कम पांच लाख plus चाहिए होता है, और credit score छह सौ अस्सी plus. अभी आपने बताया monthly sales करीब एक लाख, तो annual turnover करीब बारह लाख के आसपास आता है, इस basis पर unsecured business loan में eligibility अभी likely issue हो सकता है.

लेकिन आपके पास alternate options हो सकते हैं. अगर आपके पास कोई property है तो Loan Against Property में income requirement low होती है, और loan amount भी अच्छा मिल जाता है. या फिर अगर आपका turnover और profit बढ़ रहा है और आपके पास last two years ITR और business bank statement strong है तो हम re evaluate कर सकते हैं.

Quickly बताइए क्या आपके पास residential या commercial property mortgage के लिए available है? और आपकी existing EMI अभी कोई चल रही है क्या, और business vintage कितने साल का है?

leads.title: The user, Ashish Kumar, requested an unsecured MSME business loan
leads.summary: The user, Ashish Kumar, requested an unsecured MSME business loan. The agent gathered his name, phone number, and confirmed his preference for an unsecured loan with monthly sales of approximately ₹1
leads.transcript:
[AGENT] Hi, I'm Riya from RupeeBoss Support. Main apki kaise madad kar sakti hu?
[USER] हाँ मैम, मुझे एमएसएमई और के तहत जो है लोन चाहिए था।
[AGENT] [helpful] बिल्कुल, MSME के लिए business loan arrange हो सकता है। आगे बढ़ने से पहले आपकी basic details ले लूँ? आपका नाम क्या है और आपका फोन नंबर क्या है?

और एक quick समझ के लिए बताइए: आप कौन सा loan prefer कर रहे हैं, unsecured MSME business loan या property के against secured loan? Approx कितनी amount चाहिए, और आपकी monthly sales या monthly income roughly कितनी है?
[USER] हाँ। मेरा नाम आशीष कुमार हुआ और मेरा जो है, हमको unsecured loan चाहिए था और जो mobile number है वो रहेगा 7061740105, ठीक है, और जो monthly sale है वो है आपका approx एक लाख के आसपास।
[AGENT] [calm] ठीक है आशीष कुमार जी, details मिल गईं। Unsecured Business Loan के लिए हमारे criteria के हिसाब से minimum turnover करीब पचास लाख सालाना चाहिए होता है, और credit score भी ideally छह सौ अस्सी प्लस। आपकी monthly sale एक लाख के आसपास है, तो yearly turnover करीब बारह लाख बनेगा, इस basis पर unsecured business loan में approval tough हो सकता है।

आपके लिए दो practical options हो सकते हैं: एक, अगर आपके पास residential या commercial property है तो Loan Against Property में eligibility better रहती है; दूसरा, working capital type funding कुछ cases में fit बैठती है, लेकिन उसमें भी turnover higher side चाहिए होता है।

आप बस ये दो चीज़ confirm कर दीजिए: आपकी business की vintage कितने साल की है, और आपका credit score roughly पता है क्या? और क्या आपके पास कोई property available है mortgage के लिए?
[USER] ...
[AGENT] [gentle] आशीष जी, आप line पर हैं क्या? बस confirm कर दीजिए आपकी business कितने साल पुरानी है, credit score पता है या नहीं, और क्या आपके पास mortgage के लिए कोई property available ह...

leads.summary: The user, Sandeep Devrao Nipani, requested an unsecured business loan of 50 lakh. The agent gathered details including his name, phone number, business type (private limited, 5 years old), monthly inc
leads.transcript:
[AGENT] Hi, I'm Riya from RupeeBoss Support. Main apki kaise madad kar sakti hu?
[USER] Mujhe loan chahiye.
[AGENT] [helpful] बिल्कुल, मैं help कर देती हूँ. आगे बढ़ने के लिए आपका नाम और आपका फोन नंबर बताइए, ताकि मैं आपके लिए सही loan options check कर सकूँ. फिर बताइए आपको कौन सा loan चाहिए, Business Loan, Loan Against Property, या Home Loan, और approx कितनी amount चाहिए?
[USER] Business Loan चाहिए 50 लाख का.
[AGENT] ठीक है,...
[USER] [गला साफ करने की आवा�
[AGENT] कोई बात नहीं. [slow] आपका नाम और फोन नंबर बताइए, ताकि मैं आपकी request आगे process कर सकूँ. फिर बस ये भी बता दीजिए आपकी monthly sales या income approx कितनी है, business कितने साल पुराना है, और proprietorship है या partnership या private limited?
[USER] हाँ, मेरा नाम संदीप देवराव निपाणी, mobile number 9158402823. मेरा business का time हुआ five years. Monthly income आएगी मेरी चालीस हजार.
[AGENT] ठीक है संदीप जी, thanks. आप Unsecured Business Loan के लिए पचास लाख देख रहे हैं और आपकी monthly income करीब चालीस हजार है, business five years पुराना है. एक quick check के लिए बताइए आपका business structure क्या है, proprietorship, partnership, या private limited, और अभी कोई existing EMI चल रही है क्या?
[USER] मेरा business private limited है. अभी EMI कोई भी नहीं चल रही है.
[AGENT] nan
[AGENT] nan
[AGENT] संदीप जी, noted, आपका business private limited है और अभी कोई EMI नहीं चल रही. अभी मेरे side से eligibility tool execute नहीं हो पा रहा है, लेकिन मैं आपको pre check के हिसाब से guide कर देती हूँ. आपकी monthly income चालीस हजार के basis पर पचास लाख unsecured business loan approve होना मुश्किल हो सकता है; आम तौर पर इस amount के लिए income और banking turnover stronger चाहिए होता है, या फिर secured option जैसे Loan Against Property बेहतर रहता है, जिसमें rate आठ point दो five percent onwards हो सकता है.

आपकी average monthly bank credit turnover कितना आता है, और आप कितनी loan tenure सोच रहे हैं, जैसे three years या five years? अगर आपके पास property available है तो क्या आप Loan Against Property consider कर सकते हैं?
[USER] [बैकग्राउंड में एक अजीब संगीत बजता है] Property तो नहीं है मेरे पास। मेरे पास अभी मेरा भाई business बढ़ाना है, इसलिए मेरे को loan चाहिए।
[AGENT] समझ गई संदीप जी, अगर property नहीं है तो फिर हम Unsecured Business Loan ही explore करेंगे. पचास लाख के लिए lender आम तौर पर bank turnover और profits को बहुत weightage देते हैं, तो आपका average monthly bank credit turnover और last one year में approx yearly turnover कितना रहा है, ये बताइए ताकि मैं realistic amount and best lender option suggest कर सकूँ. साथ में क्या आपके private limited में आप director हैं, और company का GST active है क्या?
[USER] मेरा GST नहीं है. monthly मेरा पिछले साल का turnover लगभग
[AGENT] आपकी बात बीच में रह गई संदीप जी, monthly turnover का figure पूरा बताइए. और confirm कर दीजिए, GST नहीं है तो क्या आपका turnover GST threshold से नीचे है या आपने registration नहीं कराया; साथ ही company के last six months के bank statements available हैं क्या?

[AGENT] ठीक है संदीप जी, monthly turnover चार से पांच लाख और statements available हैं. Unsecured Business Loan में lenders usually credit score और profitability भी देखते हैं; क्या आपका credit score approx सात सौ के आसपास है या आप जानते हैं? और आपको पूरे पचास लाख चाहिए या starting में कम amount,...
[USER] सात सौ परस है। सात सौ साढ़े सात सौ।
[AGENT] ठीक है संदीप जी, credit...
[USER] हाँ, बेहतर होंग
[AGENT] संदीप जी, credit score सात सौ से सात सौ पचास होना plus point है. आपके monthly turnover चार से पांच लाख और business five years का है, तो हम unsecured business loan में realistic sanction amount typically turnover और banking strength के हिसाब से set करेंगे; full पचास लाख tough हो सकता है, लेकिन thirty से forty lakh range try किया जा सकता है, और अगर banking strong रही तो higher also possible. Interest rate UBL में twelve point nine nine percent onwards रहती है, final rate profile पे depend करेगी.

Next step के लिए मैं आपके case को relationship manager को assign करवा दूँ, वो documents list share करके exact eligibility और best offers निकालेंगे. बस confirm कर दीजिए आपकी city कौन सी है, और loan amount में आप minimum कितना accept कर लेंगे अगर full पचास lakh नहीं हुआ, जैसे thirty five या forty? क्या मैं आपकी और किसी चीज में help कर दूँ?

[AGENT] ठीक है संदीप जी, noted, आप forty से forty five lakh तक comfortable हैं. आप अपनी city बता दीजिए ताकि मैं सही team map कर सकूँ, और company के basic docs ready रखिए,...
[USER] हाँ, आर्मोरी। मेरी city आर्मोरी।
[AGENT] ठीक है संदीप जी, आर्मोरी city noted. मैं आपका lead forward कर रही हूँ; हमारी team आपसे call करके forty to forty five lakh unsecured business loan के options, rate twelve point nine nine percent onwards, और required documents share कर देगी, जैसे company KYC, MOA AOA incorporation certificate, directors KYC, और last six months bank statements. Call के लिए best time क्या रहेगा, morning या evening? और क्या मैं आपकी किसी और loan related help कर दूँ?

leads.name: Unknown
leads.title: The user, Ritesh, contacted support requesting an immediate connection with a Re
leads.summary: The user, Ritesh, contacted support requesting an immediate connection with a Relationship Manager for an unsecured business loan in Dehradun. He provided his name (Ritesh), mobile number (7830474563)
leads.transcript:
[AGENT] Hi, I'm Riya from RupeeBoss Support. Main apki kaise...
[USER] [background noise] Ji, ji. number se ya koi relation manager se baat ho sakti hai. Just now.
[AGENT] [slow] हाँ बिल्कुल, अभी connect करवा देती हूँ. उससे पहले बस आपकी profile confirm करने के लिए आपका नाम और mobile number बता दीजिए, ताकि सही Relationship Manager assign हो जाए. आप किस city में हैं, और आपको कौन सा loan चाहिए, Business Loan या Loan Against Property?
[USER] नाम है रितेश, mobile number है 7830474563, loan मुझे unsecured चाहिए, बारह लाख या दस लाख का या आठ लाख में से बारह लाख कुछ भी हो जाए. Proprietorship है, सारी detail पहले दे चुका हूँ. तुरंत मुझे Relationship Manager से देहरादून में संपर्क कराएं, immediate.
[AGENT] [fast] ठीक है रितेश जी, thank you. आपका mobile number मैंने noted कर लिया है. अभी मैं देहरादून के लिए Unsecured Business Loan के Relationship Manager को request raise कर रही हूँ ताकि वो आपको तुरंत call करें.

बस एक quick confirmation चाहिए ताकि गलत team में ना जाए: आपका business vintage कितना है, और average monthly sales या income approx कितनी है? और loan amount final किस पर lock करें, आठ, दस या बारह लाख?
[USER] बारह लाख।
[AGENT] ठीक है, बारह लाख के लिए ...
[USER] amount आप lock करे�
[AGENT] ठीक है रितेश जी, मैं amount बारह लाख lock कर देती हूँ...
[USER] हाँ। तावन या पतंग बास लगे।
[AGENT] ठीक है रितेश जी, मैं बारह लाख amount lock कर रही हूँ. Relationship Manager को immediate callback के लिए trigger करवा देती हूँ, ताकि देहरादून में आपको जल्दी connect मिल जाए.

बस last दो चीज़ें confirm कर दीजिए: आपका business कितने साल से चल रहा है, और approx monthly turnover या income कितनी रहती है? इससे RM call पर directly सही options और documents बता पाएंगे.
[USER] business मैं पुराना है, थोड़ा सा आपदा में बह गया था, अभी मैंने थोड़ा सा cloud की item type की चला रहा हूँ, मुझे उसी के लिए funding चाहिए, थोड़ा सा बड़ा करना है, बढ़ाना है.
[AGENT] समझ गई रितेश जी. आपके case में RM को सही guidance देने के लिए बस exact numbers चाहिए होंगे, वरना offer delay हो सकता है. आप roughly बता दीजिए business कितने साल पुराना है, और अभी average monthly sales कितनी हो रही है. साथ ही current location देहरादून ही confirm है न?

ये details मिलते ही मैं देहरादून RM को “urgent funding, Unsecured, twelve lakh” के tag के साथ अभी forward कर देती हूँ.
[USER] ठीक है. Okay, bye.
[AGENT] ठीक है रितेश जी. Relationship Manager को urgent callback के लिए request raise कर दी है. बस confirm कर दूँ, क्या मैं आपकी और किसी चीज़ में help कर सकती हूँ?
